case_title: JONES, TIMOTHY F. vs. DA SILVA, HAMILTON GARCIA MR. et al

docket_entries.description: JUDGE-DIANE WICK, REPORTER-MARCIA HOLMES, 2:47PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFT. MRS. HAMILTON GARCIA DA SILVA. DEFT. MR. HAMILTON GARCIA DA SILVA REPRESENTED THAT HE HAD AUTHORITY TO ACT IN HIS WIFES BEHALF. INTERPRETER IRA D. DASILVA- SWORN. PLTF. REPRESENTED BY THEODORE H. LONG. AFTER SETTLEMENT DISCUSSION W/COURT CASE SETTLED. TERMS READ INTO RECORD, PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DA SILVA, HAMILTON GARCIA MR. DA SILVA, HAMILTON GARCIA MRS. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 445 ROLPH STREET, SF, CA 94112 $3,300.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,300.00, STAYED UNTIL JUN-07-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
